title: Mob Hud
description: Mob Hud adds a simple bar wich indicates health and name of the entity the player is looking at
body:
# MobHUD

**MobHUD** adds a clean and minimal HUD that displays information about the entity you are looking at.

When you aim at a mob or any living entity, MobHUD shows its **name and health bar** at the top of your screen, making combat and exploration easier without cluttering the interface.

## Features

* Displays the **entity name**
* Shows a **health bar**
* Appears only when you **look at a mob**
* Clean and **minimal HUD design**
* Lightweight and **client-side only**

## Why MobHUD?

MobHUD provides quick and useful information during combat without changing Minecraft’s gameplay.
The interface is simple, readable, and designed to blend naturally with the vanilla HUD.

## Compatibility

* Works with most entities and mobs
* Client-side mod
* Built using **Fabric**

## Future plans

Possible future improvements may include:

* Additional entity information
* Customization options
* Visual improvements

---

Simple. Clean. Useful.
